properties.dose: Light: 10-15mg Common: 15-20mg Strong: 20-30mg | Note: These dosages are extremely tentative.
properties.summary: The drug is barbiturate that was used for anesthesia during surgery. The drug has a very rapid onset and a short duration of effects.
